title: GET /api/v1/timelines/tag/:hashtag — hashtag timeline with pagination
description:
## What
Implement the hashtag timeline endpoint. Index hashtags from post content at post-creation time into a post_tags table. GET /api/v1/timelines/tag/:hashtag returns paginated public posts containing that hashtag, from both local posts and cached remote posts. Support since_id, max_id, min_id, and limit pagination using snowflake ordering. Support local=true param to filter to only local posts.

## Why
Hashtag timelines are a primary discovery feature. Ivory and Elk both render hashtag pages. Without this, clicking any hashtag shows an empty feed. Part of sub-epic 8-C.

## Agent team pattern
- Spawn a Research subagent to: curl mastodon.social /api/v1/timelines/tag/rust to capture exact Status array response shape and Link header pagination format; document whether mastodon.social uses /api/v1/trends/tags or /api/v1/timelines/tag for the hashtag page; check what local=true param does in mastodon source.
- Spawn an Implementation subagent to: create post_tags migration (post_id INTEGER, tag TEXT, UNIQUE(post_id, tag)); create remote_post_tags migration (remote_post_id INTEGER, tag TEXT); add hashtag extraction at post creation time (parse #word patterns from content, lowercase, insert into post_tags); add same extraction for inbound Create Note in inbox handler; implement GET /api/v1/timelines/tag/:hashtag handler: UNION query over posts JOIN post_tags and remote_posts JOIN remote_post_tags WHERE tag = lower(:hashtag) AND visibility = public; apply since_id/max_id/min_id/limit pagination; set Link header with rel=next/prev; respect local=true by excluding remote_post_tags rows.
- Spawn a Test subagent to: write integration tests with in-memory SQLite; create local post with #Rust hashtag; assert it appears in GET /api/v1/timelines/tag/rust (case-insensitive match); assert pagination Link header present; assert local=true excludes remote posts; assert post without #rust does not appear; assert response shape matches mastodon.social fixture.

## Test discipline
- Independent oracle: mastodon.social /api/v1/timelines/tag/rust live fixture for Status array shape and Link header format; hashtag regex: #[[:word:]]+ per Unicode standard (not the extraction code under test).
- Test approach: integration test with in-memory SQLite; create post via the post creation path (exercises hashtag extraction); query timeline; verify response; pagination test: create 5 posts with same hashtag; query with limit=2; verify Link header next URL; fetch next page; verify non-overlapping results.

## Defensive programming checklist
- Lowercase all hashtags before storing and querying (case-insensitive matching)
- Hashtag extraction regex must be Unicode-aware (#cafe should match, #123 should not)
- Hashtag param: strip leading # if present (clients may include it)
- Pagination: use snowflake IDs not OFFSET (OFFSET breaks with new inserts)
- No .unwrap() in handler path
- Do not 500 on a hashtag with zero posts — return empty array with 200
